texto: Watching TV helps me come up with a lot of new ideas. Psychological and mystery help me the most because of how thought provoking they are!
explicacao: Citação de B.A. Gabrielle sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Watching TV helps me come up with a lot of new ideas. Psychological and mystery help me the most …” articula reflexao, author, author-quote em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como author-quote.
